text: Open Source Intel Trump: The person who filed the meritless and lawless suit on the desperately needed White House Ballroom, being built as a GIFT to America (without Tax Dollars!), a woman walking her dog, has absolutely NO STANDING to bring such a monumentally important case against our Country. text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：那个对急需的白宫宴会厅提起毫无根据且无法律依据诉讼的人——该宴会厅是作为给美国的礼物（未使用纳税人的钱！）建造的——一个遛狗的女人，根本没有资格对我们的国家提起如此重大的诉讼。这位憎恨特朗普的法官的意见与他几周前发布的第一个意见截然不同，而且仍然是非法和模棱两可的，甚至从未提及她完全缺乏诉讼资格。每一位政治“权威人士”都说这个案件毫无根据，甚至是个笑话，但这对我或美国人民来说不是笑话。为了让法官声称他裁定反对“唐纳德·特朗普”，投入了太多的辛勤工作、时间和金钱，这是我非常习惯的事情，但我绝不会接受！总统 DJT 推文

text: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🚀 🇺🇸 The U.S. Missile Defense Agency has awarded Northrop Grumman an additional contract modification to accelerate the development of the Glide Phase Interceptor (GPI) hypersonic interceptor. The value of the agreement is $475.3 million, bringing the total contract amount to $1.31 billion. The revised contract sets an accelerated development timeline, with a target completion date of June 2028. The GPI interceptor is designed to engage hypersonic glide vehicles during their glide phase, when they are no longer powered by engines. This phase occurs after separation from the booster and before the final descent toward the target. It is particularly challenging due to the weapon’s high speed and maneuverability. Video Made Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @StatWatch25：🚀 🇺🇸 美国导弹防御局已授予诺斯罗普·格鲁曼公司额外的合同修改，以加速滑翔阶段拦截器 (GPI) 高超音速拦截器的开发。该协议价值4.753亿美元，使合同总额达到13.1亿美元。修订后的合同设定了加速开发时间表，目标完成日期为2028年6月。GPI拦截器旨在在高超音速滑翔飞行器处于滑翔阶段（即不再由发动机提供动力时）对其进行拦截。这一阶段发生在与助推器分离后、向目标进行最后下降之前。由于该武器的高速度和机动性，这一阶段极具挑战性。视频由 Grok AI 制作 推文

text: WarMonitor This refers to a string of mysterious deaths and disappearances of U.S. scientists tied to advanced nuclear, aerospace, and defense research, fueling speculation of a possible connection. Doocy: There are at least ten missing scientists with access to classified material Trump: I hope it’s random. We’re going to know in the next week and a half. Doocy: It is possible a foreign adversary is in the US scooping people up. Trump: Well, Biden had open borders. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2044845141161341095/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这指的是一系列与先进核、航空航天和国防研究相关的美国科学家神秘死亡和失踪事件，引发了可能存在关联的猜测。杜西：至少有十名接触过机密材料的科学家失踪。特朗普：我希望这只是随机事件。我们会在未来一周半内知道。杜西：有可能是一个外国对手在美国抓人。特朗普：嗯，拜登实行了开放边境政策。 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2044845141161341095/video/1 - Acyn 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @ChristopherJM : Russia is readying a fresh offensive in SE Ukraine, dipping into its strategic reserve to add 20,000 fresh troops to its force inside the country, Ukraine's GUR military intel told me. With some 680,000 soldiers now on the ground, Russia aims to take the Donbas by September. https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816?syn-25a6b1a6=1 tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 WSJ: The grandson of Raul Castro attempted to contact the White House through back channels by tapping a wealthy Havana businessman to pass along a letter last week, reportedly directly to U.S. President Trump. The letter was similar to an official one, even carrying the official Cuban seal, and proposed oppotunities for U.S. investment and economic agreements Cuba along with sanctions relief. The letter courier, Roberto Carlos Chamizo González, was stopped at Miami International Airport and the letter confiscated, ending the effort. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 《华尔街日报》：劳尔·卡斯特罗的孙子试图通过幕后渠道联系白宫，他上周指派了一名哈瓦那富商转交一封信，据报道是直接转交给美国总统特朗普。这封信看起来像是一封正式信函，甚至带有古巴官方印章，信中提议美国在古巴进行投资和达成经济协议，并要求解除制裁。信使罗伯托·卡洛斯·查米佐·冈萨雷斯在迈阿密国际机场被拦截，信件被没收，此次尝试随之告终。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has called on residents not to return to targeted areas in southern Lebanon, the Bekaa and Beirut’s southern suburbs until the situation becomes fully clear following the ceasefire announcement. The group acknowledged the desire to return home and praised the people’s patience and steadfastness, but urged restraint out of concern for their safety. It promised that residents would return with heads held high, as always. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党呼吁居民在停火声明发布后，在局势完全明朗之前，不要返回黎巴嫩南部、贝卡谷地和贝鲁特南郊的目标区域。该组织承认人们渴望回家，并赞扬了民众的耐心和坚定，但出于安全考虑，敦促大家保持克制。它承诺，居民们将像往常一样昂首挺胸地回家。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 U.S. Department of State: Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against PLANNED, IMMINENT*, or ongoing attacks. This shall not be impeded by the cessation of hostilities. Besides this, it will…" 🇮🇱 "We remain in Lebanon in a reinforced security zone... we are not leaving." - Netanyahu 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 美国国务院：以色列应保留在任何时候针对已计划、迫在眉睫*或正在进行的袭击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。这不应受到敌对行动停止的影响。除此之外，它将……” 🇮🇱 “我们仍留在黎巴嫩的一个强化安全区内……我们不会离开。” - 内塔尼亚胡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 U.S. Department of State: Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against PLANNED, IMMINENT*, or ongoing attacks. This shall not be impeded by the cessation of hostilities. Besides this, it will not carry out any offensive military operations against Lebanese targets, including civilian, military, and other state targets, in the territory of Lebanon by land, air, and sea. The Government of Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and all other rogue non-state armed groups in the territory of Lebanon from carrying out any attacks, operations, or hostile activities against Israeli targets. *This means there is no ceasefire and Israel can attack Lebanon because of vibes. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国国务院：以色列应保留在任何时候针对已计划、迫在眉睫*或正在进行的袭击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。这不应受到敌对行动停止的影响。除此之外，它不会在黎巴嫩领土上通过陆、海、空对黎巴嫩目标（包括平民、军事和其他国家目标）进行任何进攻性军事行动。黎巴嫩政府将采取有意义的措施，防止真主党及黎巴嫩领土上的所有其他流氓非国家武装团体对以色列目标进行任何袭击、行动或敌对活动。*这意味着并没有真正的停火，以色列可以因为“感觉”而攻击黎巴嫩。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters : The heads of the US Interior and Energy Departments are to hold a call with CEOs from energy companies, including Exxon and Chevron, to discuss their potential to boost oil and gas output, amidst rising global energy prices due to the Iran war. Global oil prices have spiked by about 4.6% to above $99 a barrel, with traders questioning whether peace talks between the US and Iran would resolve disruptions to Middle Eastern energy supplies caused by the war. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：美国内政部和能源部负责人将与包括埃克森美孚和雪佛龙在内的能源公司首席执行官举行电话会议，讨论在伊朗战争导致全球能源价格上涨的情况下，提高石油和天然气产量的潜力。全球油价已飙升约4.6%，突破每桶99美元，交易员们质疑美国与伊朗之间的和平谈判是否能解决战争导致的对中东能源供应的干扰。 @wfwitness

text_zh: 开源情报：你知道当我提到“我头顶上方不断听到重型喷气式飞机的活动”时是什么意思吗？我决定为你拍一段视频，这样你就能明白我的意思了。今天我一直在听到这个声音。在停火生效前，以色列还有些工作要做。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044856578793156921/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Russia attacked multiple cities across Ukraine, including Kyiv and Odesa, launching about 40 missiles and more than 660 drones, killing at least 16 people, including a child. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044856221119693131/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：俄罗斯袭击了乌克兰各地的多个城市，包括基辅和敖德萨，发射了约40枚导弹和660多架无人机，造成至少16人死亡，其中包括一名儿童。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044856221119693131/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The 1st Corps of the National Guard of Ukraine "Azov" has declared drone control over Russian logistics near temporarily occupied Donetsk. Ukrainian UAVs are actively operating along routes near Zuhres, Andriivka, Starobesheve, Horlivka, Lysychansk, and the ring road; the success of their operations highlights the ineffectiveness of the Russian airspace control system. /1128083841/8228 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：乌克兰国民警卫队“亚速”第1军宣布，已控制了临时被占领的顿涅茨克附近的俄罗斯后勤补给线。乌克兰无人机在祖格雷斯（Zuhres）、安德里伊夫卡（Andriivka）、斯塔罗别舍韦（Starobesheve）、霍尔利夫卡（Horlivka）、利西昌斯克（Lysychansk）和环城公路附近的航线上积极活动；其行动的成功凸显了俄罗斯领空控制系统的无效性。 /1128083841/8228 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @AFP: #BREAKING Trump says Iran has agreed to hand over its enriched uranium supply https://twitter.com/AFP/status/2044841824922005810/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转发 @AFP：#快讯 特朗普称伊朗已同意移交其浓缩铀储备 https://twitter.com/AFP/status/2044841824922005810/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @OlgaNYC1211 : The Israelis are lying. They were informed last month that this Russian vessel, part of Russia’s shadow fleet, was transporting stolen Ukrainian grain and still allowed it to dock on April 12 and leave the port yesterday Disgusting they are supporting terrorist Russia 🇮🇱 ❗️ 🇺🇦 Israel has allowed a Russian ship carrying stolen Ukrainian grain to sail, saying it was “too late” to detain it, - Axios Israeli Foreign Minister sent a text message to Andriy Sybiha, saying the ship had already left the port of Haifa and could not be stopped. Ukraine’s Foreign Ministry told reporters that Israeli authorities were warned about ship two weeks before it arrived in Haifa. - Savchenko Volodymyr tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @OlgaNYC1211：以色列人在撒谎。他们上个月就被告知这艘俄罗斯船只是俄罗斯影子船队的一部分，正在运输被盗的乌克兰谷物，但他们仍然允许它在4月12日停靠，并于昨天离开港口。令人作呕的是，他们竟然支持恐怖主义俄罗斯 🇮🇱 ❗️ 🇺🇦 以色列允许一艘载有被盗乌克兰谷物的俄罗斯船只航行，称扣押它“为时已晚” - Axios。以色列外交部长给安德烈·西比哈（Andriy Sybiha）发了短信，称该船已离开海法港，无法拦截。乌克兰外交部告诉记者，以色列当局在船只抵达海法前两周就收到了警告。 - Savchenko Volodymyr 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reporter: What is your reaction to Russia's overnight attack on Kyiv? Trump: I think it's terrible. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044854324384215419/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 记者：你对俄罗斯昨晚袭击基辅有什么反应？特朗普：我认为这太可怕了。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044854324384215419/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on whether a 20-year minimum for Iran to stop enriching uranium is acceptable: "We have a statement, a very powerful statement, that they will not have, beyond 20 years, that they will NOT have nuclear weapons. There's no 20-year limit." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044853816659451989/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普关于20年内停止浓缩铀的期限是否可以接受： “我们有一份声明，一份非常有力的声明，即他们不会，在20年后，他们将不会拥有核武器。没有20年的限制。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044853816659451989/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu says he rejected Hezbollah's demands for a full Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon and a "quiet for quiet" ceasefire. The new ceasefire will follow the November 2024 model: IDF remains in Lebanon, Israel continues to strike Hezbollah. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044853167179870618/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡表示，他拒绝了真主党关于以色列全面撤出黎巴嫩以及“以静制静”停火的要求。新的停火将遵循2024年11月的模式：以色列国防军留在黎巴嫩，以色列继续打击真主党。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044853167179870618/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) REPORTER: Are you still interested in acquiring Iranian oil? US PRESIDENT TRUMP: Well, we'll see. I mean, we have a very good relationship with Iran right now, as hard as it is to believe. And I think it's a combination of about 4 weeks of bombing and a very powerful blockade. The blockade is maybe more powerful than the bombing if you wanna know the truth. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 记者：你还有兴趣获取伊朗石油吗？美国总统特朗普：嗯，我们会看到的。我的意思是，我们现在与伊朗的关系非常好，尽管这很难相信。我认为这是大约4周的轰炸和强力封锁共同作用的结果。如果你想知道真相，封锁可能比轰炸更有效。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Doocy: There are at least ten missing scientists with access to classified material Trump: I hope it’s random. We’re going to know in the next week and a half. Doocy: It is possible a foreign adversary is in the US scooping people up. Trump: Well, Biden had open borders. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044852350523740513/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 Doocy：至少有十名掌握机密材料的科学家失踪。特朗普：我希望这是随机的。我们会在接下来的一周半内知道。 Doocy：有可能是一个外国对手在美国抓人。特朗普：嗯，拜登有开放的边境。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044852350523740513/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump says the next round of in-person peace talks with Iran could happen as soon as this weekend. "The blockade has been incredible... They're unable to do any business because of the blockade. The combination of having no Navy, having no Air Force, having no anti-aircraft equipment, they have nothing. Everything is gone, including their leaders." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普表示，下一轮与伊朗的面对面和平谈判最早可能在本周末进行。“封锁令人难以置信……因为封锁，他们无法进行任何业务。没有海军、没有空军、没有防空装备，他们什么都没有。一切都完了，包括他们的领导人。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran: “We safeguard freedom of navigation in the Hormuz” Also Iran: “We forgot where we dropped those mines in the Hormuz” Iran Tells U.N.: We are a “responsible state committed to the U.N. Charter” and “we safeguard freedom of navigation” in the Strait of Hormuz. Forgot To Mention: Iran booby-trapped the Strait of Hormuz with sea mines. - UN Watch tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗：“我们维护霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由” 同样是伊朗：“我们忘了把那些水雷投在霍尔木兹海峡的什么地方了” 伊朗告诉联合国：我们是一个“致力于联合国宪章的负责任国家”，并且“我们维护霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由”。 忘了提：伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡布满了水雷。 - UN Watch 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: “Iran wants to make a deal with us” Islamic regime diplomats: “We created an AI video of President Trumps face being burned by matches” https://twitter.com/IRANinMAZAR/status/2044664141965668672/video/1 - Consulate General of I.R.Iran in Mazar-e-Sharif tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：“伊朗想和我们达成协议” 伊斯兰政权外交官：“我们制作了一个特朗普总统脸部被火柴烧毁的AI视频” https://twitter.com/IRANinMAZAR/status/2044664141965668672/video/1 - 伊朗伊斯兰共和国驻马扎里沙里夫总领事馆 推文

text: WarMonitor The president downplays gas prices, saying they’re lower than expected, negotiations are going well, and claims we’ll get “free oil” that will bring prices “lower than they were before,” despite experts warning prices won’t normalize anytime soon. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044850629512712511/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：总统淡化了汽油价格，称其低于预期，谈判进展顺利，并声称我们将获得“免费石油”，这将使价格“比以前更低”，尽管专家警告称价格短期内不会恢复正常。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044850629512712511/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel REPORTER: "Israel and Lebanon have tried to make peace before. What's going to be the difference this time?" PRESIDENT TRUMP: "Me. I'm the difference." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044850600068653112/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 记者：“以色列和黎巴嫩以前曾尝试过和平。这次会有什么不同？” 总统特朗普：“我。我就是不同之处。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044850600068653112/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @CENTCOM : This morning, Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM commander, addressed media at the Pentagon during a briefing on the blockade against ships attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. He highlighted his most recent trip to the Middle East where he visited with U.S. service members and engaged regional allies and partners. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转发 @CENTCOM：今天早上，中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）海军上将在五角大楼的简报会上向媒体发表讲话，内容是关于针对试图进入或离开伊朗港口的船只的封锁。他强调了他最近的中东之行，在那里他会见了美国军人，并与地区盟友和伙伴进行了接触。 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 “BLOCKADE the BLOCKADE is more powerful than bombs” — Don Tzu 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 “封锁封锁比炸弹更强大” — 唐子 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Karmiel, and the surrounding areas of the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区卡尔米耶尔及其周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Discovery of a Significant Cache of Semi-Heavy Ammunition in Hoveyzeh 🔹 Hoveyzeh County Prosecutor: Through the intelligence monitoring by the IRGC Intelligence Organization of Khuzestan, 18 rockets and RPG charges were discovered in one of the areas of Hoveyzeh County. 🔹 Counter-revolutionary elements intended to transfer this shipment with the aim of creating insecurity in the region, but their plan was foiled thanks to the vigilance of the IRGC Intelligence Organization forces. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 在胡泽斯坦省霍韦泽发现大量半重型弹药 🔹 霍韦泽县检察官：通过胡泽斯坦省伊斯兰革命卫队情报组织的监控，在霍韦泽县某地区发现了18枚火箭弹和RPG弹药。🔹 反革命分子企图转移这批物资以在该地区制造动荡，但由于伊斯兰革命卫队情报组织部队的警惕，他们的计划被挫败。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he thinks the current negotiations are "Very successful" and that he is optimistic about the results: "I think we have a very successful negotiation going on right now, and I think it'll be if it if it happens…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he himself would go to Islamabad if needed to "seal the deal:" Reporter: "Would you ever go to Pakistan to seal the deal yourself?" Trump: "I would. I would go to Pakistan. Yeah. Pakistan has been great. They've been so good. Islamabad, I'll be I might go." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他认为目前的谈判‘非常成功’，并对结果持乐观态度：‘我认为我们现在进行的谈判非常成功，如果……如果它发生的话……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果有必要，他本人会前往伊斯兰堡以“达成协议”：记者：“您会亲自去巴基斯坦达成协议吗？”特朗普：“我会的。我会去巴基斯坦。是的。巴基斯坦一直很棒。他们一直很好。伊斯兰堡，我会……我可能会去。” @wfwitness
